content:
type: STATUS
files: src/PIL/Image.py,Tests/test_image_quantize.py
summary: Done: added sort_palette=None as final kwarg on quantize(), plus a _sort_palette() helper method appended right after quantize(); added test_sort_palette and test_sort_palette_invalid_value at end of test_image_quantize.py. Noting our quantize() signature edits both insert as 'final kwarg' - if patches are merged, order will need reconciling, but each of our diffs is self-consistent independently.
